title: Skipping identical run overwrites stats file
body:
When running verilator twice, the second run overwrites the stats file even if --skip-identical took effect (and then the contents of the new stats file are lacking).

Reproduce:

```
rm -rf test_regress/obj_vlt
test_regress/t/t_opt_ifjumpgo.py # Passes
test_regress/t/t_opt_ifjumpgo.py # Fails - stats file does not contain expected line
test_regress/t/t_opt_ifjumpgo.py --no-skip-identical # Passes again
```
code_blocks:
rm -rf test_regress/obj_vlt
test_regress/t/t_opt_ifjumpgo.py # Passes
test_regress/t/t_opt_ifjumpgo.py # Fails - stats file does not contain expected line
test_regress/t/t_opt_ifjumpgo.py --no-skip-identical # Passes again
